title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Siemens India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Siemens India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Siemens India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
